text:
byDelilah Gray

Trending News Editor

Jessica Chastainjust made an ultra-rare appearance with her two rarely-seen kids, and they all looked so darn cute together as they watched theOlympics.

In case you missed it, Chastain was photographed with her rarely-seen children while cheering on the women’s artistic gymnastics at the ParisOlympics. In photos obtained byDailyMail, we can see Chastain looking radiant, as always, in a knit sweater containing the Olympic rings and the USA flag, sitting next to her two kiddos: daughter Giulietta and son Augustus.Related storyTyra Banks Looks Unrecognizable With Her Shortest & Most Old Hollywood Inspired Hairdo to Date

We see her daughter Giulietta on her left, looking so adorable in a rainbow shirt, and her son Augustus on the other side of her, wearing a blue shirt that says “USA.” Both of her kiddos have adorable little blonde curls; they definitely have their dad’s curly hair!

Genuinely, we can’t remember another time we’ve seen Chastain’s kids, especially since she is so private when it comes to her personal life. We just hope they had the best time together at theOlympics!

For those who don’t know, Chastain has two children with her husband, Gian Luca Passi de Preposulo: adaughter named GiuliettaPassi Chastain, born in late 2018, and a son named Augustus Passi, born sometime in 2022.

In a rare interview withPeoplefor her filmThe 335, Ishe talked about how she ensured all moms on set stayed happy and empowered.

“I love bringing families on set,” she said. “We had a trailer that was for children, and so how wonderful that, yes we can be successful and wonderful at our work, but we can also not have to shut down part of our life in order to do so.”

title: Jessica Chastain Brought Her Rarely-Seen Kids to Watch the Olympics
author: Delilah Gray
description: Jessica Chastain and her kids cheer on women's artistic gymnastics at the Paris Olympics, making an ultra-rare appearance together.
